summary: This token has some concerning features. The fee rate is at the maximum 10%, and holder rewards are relatively low compared to creator allocation. Exercise caution.

rules.name: Honeypot Recipient
rules.message: Recipient address is a regular wallet (EOA). No honeypot risk.

rules.name: Predatory Tax Config
rules.message: Tax distribution is within acceptable range.

rules.name: Extreme Fee Rate
rules.message: MEDIUM: 10% fee on every trade is very high.

rules.name: No Anti-Sniper Protection
rules.message: LOW: Anti-sniper mode disabled. Bots may front-run early trades.

rules.name: Zero Holder Rewards
rules.message: Holders receive a share of tax fees.

rules.name: Fresh Creator Check
rules.message: Creator wallet has been active for 3 months.
